---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="about-hero">
  <div class="about-hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="about-hero-grid">

    <!-- Text -->
    <div>
      <div class="fade-in">
        <p class="about-eyebrow">About</p>
      </div>
      <div class="fade-in d1">
        <h1 class="about-headline">
          Hi, I&rsquo;m Youwei &mdash;<br>
          <em>nice to meet you.</em>
        </h1>
      </div>
      <div class="fade-in d2">
        <p class="about-intro">
          I&rsquo;m a grad student who wandered into biostatistics from the world of
          financial mathematics &mdash; and honestly, I think it was the best detour I ever took.
        </p>
        <p class="about-intro">
          These days I spend my time writing Stan models, debugging Shiny apps, and trying to
          understand why brains and viruses are so complicated.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Photo -->
    <div class="about-photo-wrap fade-in d2">
      <div class="about-photo-frame">
        <img src="images/selfy.png" alt="Youwei Hu">
      </div>
    </div>
    
</section>

<!-- THE PATH HERE -->
<section class="story-section">
  <div class="section-header fade-in">
    <span class="section-header-label">The Path Here</span>
    <div class="section-header-line"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="story-grid">
    <div class="story-card fade-in">
      <div class="s-label">Before</div>
      <div class="s-title">Started in Finance &amp; Math</div>
      <p class="s-body">My undergrad was all about quantitative thinking &mdash; derivatives pricing,
      risk models, stochastic calculus. It taught me to love abstraction. But something felt missing.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="story-card fade-in d1">
      <div class="s-label">Turning point</div>
      <div class="s-title">Found the intersection</div>
      <p class="s-body">A course on statistical inference clicked something: these tools could answer
      questions about people, not just markets. I started looking for problems with real stakes.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="story-card fade-in d2">
      <div class="s-label">Now</div>
      <div class="s-title">Biostatistics at Emory</div>
      <p class="s-body">I work at the intersection of Bayesian methods, EEG neuroscience, and infectious
      disease modeling. The problems are hard. The data is messy. I wouldn&rsquo;t have it any other way.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- A FEW THINGS ABOUT ME -->
<section class="personal-section">
  <div class="section-header fade-in">
    <span class="section-header-label">A Few Things About Me</span>
    <div class="section-header-line"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="personal-row fade-in">
    <div class="personal-row-title">I learn by doing</div>
    <p class="personal-row-body">Whether it&rsquo;s a new modeling framework or a new programming language,
    I always find it easier to just build something and work backwards from the errors.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="personal-row fade-in">
    <div class="personal-row-title">I care about communication</div>
    <p class="personal-row-body">A result you can&rsquo;t explain is only half a result. Building dashboards
    and visualizations is my way of making sure the work actually reaches the people who need it.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="personal-row fade-in">
    <div class="personal-row-title">I&rsquo;m currently looking</div>
    <p class="personal-row-body">I&rsquo;m actively exploring positions in data science, biostatistics, and
    research analytics &mdash; anywhere I can keep doing work that matters and keep learning.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Skills -->
<div class="section-block">
  <h2 class="section-title">Skills & Tools</h2>

  <table class="skills-table">
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Programming</strong></td>
      <td>
        Python (MNE, data processing, feature extraction),
        R (Shiny, flexdashboard, statistical modeling), 
        SQL, SAS, MATLAB (EEGLAB)
      </td>
    </tr>

    <tr>
      <td><strong>Statistical Methods</strong></td>
      <td>
        Bayesian hierarchical modeling (Stan), 
        regression modeling,
        hypothesis testing, 
        correlation analysis
      </td>
    </tr>

    <tr>
      <td><strong>Data Science & ML</strong></td>
      <td>
        Feature engineering (EEG biomarkers), 
        signal processing (EEG pipelines), 
        data integration across heterogeneous sources
      </td>
    </tr>

    <tr>
      <td><strong>Data Visualization</strong></td>
      <td>
        ggplot2, plotly, Shiny dashboards, interactive exploratory analysis
      </td>
    </tr>

    <tr>
      <td><strong>Research & Data Engineering</strong></td>
      <td>
        Literature-based data extraction, 
        YAML schema design, 
        LLM-assisted data structuring and validation
      </td>
    </tr>

    <tr>
      <td><strong>Tools & Platforms</strong></td>
      <td>
        GitHub, VS Code, RStudio, Stan (rstan), LaTeX
      </td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>

</section>

<!-- CONNECT -->
<section class="connect-section">
  <div class="connect-grid">
    <div class="fade-in">
      <h2 class="connect-title"> Let&rsquo;s Work Together</h2>
      <p class="connect-sub">I&rsquo;m always happy to chat about research, data science,
      career opportunities, or interesting problems you&rsquo;re working on.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="connect-links fade-in d1">
      <a href="mailto:youwei@emory.edu" class="connect-link">
        <span class="cl-label">Email</span>
        <span class="cl-value">youwei@emory.edu &nearr;</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/hww228" target="_blank" class="connect-link">
        <span class="cl-label">GitHub</span>
        <span class="cl-value">github.com/hww228 &nearr;</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/youwei-hu-62744b30b/" target="_blank" class="connect-link">
        <span class="cl-label">LinkedIn</span>
        <span class="cl-value">Youwei Hu &nearr;</span>
      </a>
      <a href="files/CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="connect-link">
        <span class="cl-label">CV</span>
        <span class="cl-value">Download PDF &nearr;</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
